title: 10 best herbal creams for colds
description: Gaultheria procumbens, also known as wintergreen, creams helps with colds because it contains methyl salicylate, a natural pain reliever similar to aspirin. This compound helps to reduce inflammation and alleviate congestion, making it easier to breathe and relax. Additionally, Gaultheria procumbens has antimicrobial properties, which can help to combat the underlying infection that causes colds.
